feat.name: Offensive Odor
feat.text: You've mastered your defensive pheromones and have nearly complete control over them. When you Emit Defensive Odor, you can either choose to increase the damage dealt to a single target by changing the damage dice to d8s, or leave the damage unchanged but spray your pheromones in a 15-foot cone.
